tasks.title: Implement `/adv-problem` spec-law impact contract with asset coverage
tasks.verification: Implemented `/adv-problem` spec-law impact contract. Added RED/GREEN asset coverage, command doc contract text, and `rq-problemSpecLaw01` in `advance-workflow`. Checkpoint commit: 3b49fa37ecdd214ce16309d12768208398314aa0.
tasks.summary: Added `plugin/src/adv-problem-assets.test.ts` to enforce stable command/spec-law contract phrases. Updated `.opencode/command/adv-problem.md` to require Spec-law impact in triage output, direct-fix no-spec-law rationale, uncertainty-to-proposal routing, and read-only boundary. Added `rq-problemSpecLaw01` with three scenarios to `.adv/specs/advance-workflow/spec.json` and bumped version to 1.8.2.
tasks.implementation_summary: Added `plugin/src/adv-problem-assets.test.ts` to enforce stable command/spec-law contract phrases. Updated `.opencode/command/adv-problem.md` to require Spec-law impact in triage output, direct-fix no-spec-law rationale, uncertainty-to-proposal routing, and read-only boundary. Added `rq-problemSpecLaw01` with three scenarios to `.adv/specs/advance-workflow/spec.json` and bumped version to 1.8.2.

tasks.title: Run verification for `/adv-problem` spec-law contract
tasks.verification: Verification, review remediation, and hardening remediation complete. Final targeted asset test passed; final `pnpm run check` passed; harden findings resolved; checkpoint commit e43ebca66179cf8dbfaaf3d5e4a9d6b7c3218b21 recorded.
tasks.summary: Verified and hardened `/adv-problem` spec-law contract. Added docs mirror update and prose-load inventory update during hardening. Resolved production-readiness ambiguity by making proposal path an explicit handoff to `/adv-proposal` while preserving `/adv-problem` no-artifact boundary.
tasks.implementation_summary: Verified and hardened `/adv-problem` spec-law contract. Added docs mirror update and prose-load inventory update during hardening. Resolved production-readiness ambiguity by making proposal path an explicit handoff to `/adv-proposal` while preserving `/adv-problem` no-artifact boundary.

proposal.approval_evidence: User approved the proposal framing with `continue`; B/F/S proposal scan had no critical findings.

discovery.approval_evidence: Discovery findings recorded; acceptance criteria and agreement approved by user reply `approve`. Contract items are represented in agreement.md pending any typed contract persistence supported by tooling.

design.approval_evidence: Design recorded. Independent adv-researcher validation returned VALIDATED with no conflicts. No user-value tradeoff or contract-compromise risk identified.

planning.approval_evidence: User approved prep vision/task graph with reply `approve`; validation passed with non-blocking NO_DELTAS warning.

execution.approval_evidence: All non-cancelled tasks done. Verification passed: targeted asset test and `pnpm run check` exit 0. Non-blocking validation warning remains: NO_DELTAS because spec law was edited directly in branch and no change.deltas tool exists in this workflow.

acceptance.approval_evidence: User accepted delivered work with reply `accept`. Review verdict APPROVED; all review findings fixed; targeted asset test and `pnpm run check` passed.

release.approval_evidence: User gave Tier B archive sign-off with exact whitelist reply `sign off`. Harden status READY; conformance state has no required specs; pre-archive validation passed with non-blocking NO_DELTAS warning.

clarify_findings.message: Scope section is empty or placeholder. What specific files/modules will change?
Proposal describes behavior that could fail but doesn't mention error handling or rollback. What happens when things go wrong?
